steps: Go to https://developer.squareup.com/apps and log in with your Square account
Click '+ Create your first application' or 'New Application'
Enter an application name and click 'Save'
Open the application you just created
Toggle between 'Sandbox' and 'Production' at the top of the page depending on your use case
Click on 'Credentials' in the left sidebar
Copy the 'Access Token' shown on the Credentials page
For production use, ensure your Square account is fully set up with a verified business

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Access Token
credential_fields.description: Your Square application access token (sandbox or production). Sent as 'Bearer {token}' in the Authorization header.

notes: connect.squareup.com is the legacy Square API domain — newer endpoints use api.squareup.com
Sandbox environment is free and available immediately for testing
Production access token grants full access to a Square seller's account data
Sandbox and Production tokens are different — do not mix environments
For multi-merchant apps, use OAuth to get per-merchant access tokens instead
API version is passed via the Square-Version header (e.g., 2024-10-17)
Rate limit: 100 requests per 10 seconds per app

test_endpoint.description: List all business locations associated with the account
